headline: 4 Solid Stocks to Buy as S&P 500 Hits Fresh All-Time Closing High
summary: As the S&P 500 logs a 24th record close, CSCO, ADI, AMAT and DDOG stand out with strong 2026 potential amid AI-driven momentum.

headline: Datadog CEO shares why new AI capabilities help securitize agents
summary: CNBC’s Seema Mody speaks exclusively with Datadog CEO Olivier Pomel, who explains why the company’s newest AI capabilities are designed to help leading AI labs secure and monitor the performance of AI agents.
